name: project_zen
description: project_zen / Realtime Android Environment Management - web MVP

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @project_zen/backend & npm run dev -w @project_zen/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @project_zen/shared && npm run build -w @project_zen/backend && npm run build -w @project_zen/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @project_zen/frontend && npm run lint -w @project_zen/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @project_zen/shared && npm run typecheck -w @project_zen/backend && npm run typecheck -w @project_zen/frontend
